title: Result - Japan
content:
Welcome to Japan, a perfect blend of modern innovation and timeless tradition. Known for its cutting-edge technology like bullet trains, Japan also cherishes its century-old customs.
The country’s mountainous terrain, dense forests and natural hot springs offer stunning scenery, while its 4 distinct seasons bring delights like cherry blossoms in spring and vibrant foliage in autumn. Stay in a traditional ryokan for warm hospitality and insight into Japanese culture. Indulge in diverse cuisine, from modern favorites like ramen and okonomiyaki to traditional dishes like sushi and soba noodles.

## Unique food tradition
Kaiseki: a traditional multi-course meal that can consist of 6-15 different dishes.
Japan has an increasing demand for skilled workers in various sectors, including technology, engineering and international business.

### Local legend or myth
Kappa: mischievous water creatures that inhabit rivers and ponds. Known for their strange behavior, they are often depicted as tricksters or pranksters.

### Language of the Land
Japanese is one of the fastest spoken languages, with native speakers speaking around 7.84 syllables per second; compared to English, which has a syllable rate of 6.19 syllables per second.
years is the average lifespan in Japan, making it the world’s longest life expectancy.
